entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`local_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `heart_rate_bpm` INTEGER, `spo2_percent` REAL, `ibi_ms` INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(`local_id`))

indices.name: index_measurements_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_measurements_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp`)
